name: R & D Transportation
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Passenger / Specialized School & Medical Transport
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (USDOT); NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire
registry_source: MN SOS portal returned system error during lookup; multiple business directories (D&B, Yelp, MAFOMN, BBB) confirm 'R and D Transportation, Inc.' established 1998, currently active; principal operating address 14021 Azurite St NW, Ramsey, MN 55303; phone (763) 767-1804
notes: Strong match: USDOT 1537852 R AND D TRANSPORTATION INC at Ramsey MN (Anoka County, ~6 miles from Coon Rapids input address). 31 power units / 31 drivers. Specializes in school district, homeless/Title I, special-ed, and medical transport across Anoka County school districts (per company description) - fits Summit School Services tuck-in profile. MCS-150 last filed 10/05/2015 (stale). Input address 10600 University Ave NW #3b, Coon Rapids 55448 likely prior office; company now at 14021 Azurite St NW, Ramsey. Also references 14331 Armstrong Blvd NW, Anoka (sister/secondary location).
